proposals.spec_text: System MUST provide pipeline diagnostics showing time breakdown across simulation, serialization, transfer, and rendering stages, accessible both via structured logs and on-demand MCP tools.
proposals.actual: Simulation tick, serialization, and gRPC transfer times are measured correctly. viewer_render_ms field exists in PipelineTimings proto but is never populated (remains 0.0). The viewer has frame timing data but no mechanism to report it back to the server.
proposals.proposed_resolution: Implement viewer render time reporting: add a ReportRenderTime RPC or piggyback on existing messages. Viewer already has frame timing via GameTime.Elapsed; needs to send smoothed average back to server periodically. Server caches and includes in PipelineTimings response.
proposals.rationale: Spec explicitly requires all four pipeline stages. Proto field already exists, MCP tools already display it, and diagnostics bottleneck detection depends on it. This was a known gap deferred during implementation (T065 noted 'or 0 if not available'), not a deliberate design change.
